productDisplayName: Highlander Men White Checked Hal Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionGrey and white bold check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has dark grey and green accents, tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest, appliqued brand tab on the bottom of the facing placket made of striped fabric, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  grey and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up to give a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
